{{Infobox character
| name = Omega’s daughter
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Omega’s daughter]] protects herself with [[Hallow Divide]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Sola]] tried to use scanners to predict [[Omega’s daughter]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Omega]]'s daughter was engulfed in golden fire.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c45">''The Pilot'', chapter 45</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Copies of [[Omega]]'s daughter are cornering [[Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46">''The Pilot'', chapter 46</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Sola turned her visor to Mell. “I tried to use my new scanners to predict Omega’s daughter.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
